case_title: WISEGARVER & ASSOCIATES INC. VS. ASHOK K GUJRAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,575.65 FILED BY WISEGARVER & ASSOCIATES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUJRAL, ASHOK K GUJRAL, SUSAN L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ASHOK K. GUJRAL ON 08/08/16 RETURNED BY USPS AS UNDELIVERABLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
